title: When Trump and Xi met as peers
description: The image of two superpowers on similar footing was exactly what Chinese President Xi Jinping aimed to achieve with the visit, analysts said.

title: Death toll in attack on Kyiv apartment building now stands at 24
description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said Friday that a Russian missile attack on a Kyiv apartment building the previous day killed 24 people, including three children.

title: After redistricting, what does representation mean to Tennessee voters?
description: What does representation look like for Tennessee voters who were split into three new congressional districts last week? NPR traveled from Memphis into the Nashville suburbs to ask.

title: Reps. Brian Fitzpatrick and Tom Suozzi on rising issue of gerrymandering
description: NPR's Michel Martin talks to Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick, R-Penn., and Rep. Tom Suozzi, D-N.Y., about what they believe is the nation's current greatest problem: gerrymandering.

title: CIA Director John Ratcliffe met with Raul Castro's grandson in Havana, US and Cuban officials say
description: CIA Director John Ratcliffe met with Cuban officials including Raúl Castro's grandson during a high-level visit to the island Thursday, Cuban and U.S. officials said.

title: Supreme Court preserves access to mail distribution of widely used abortion pill
description: The decision maintains access nationwide to medication abortion, the most common way of ending pregnancies in the United States, while litigation continues.

title: Louisiana, at center of voting rights fight, moves to redraw Black House district
description: Thursday’s vote was one of many in Southern states following the Supreme Court’s recent decision to weaken the Voting Rights Act.

title: JD Vance praises Sen. Susan Collins, a GOP moderate and occasional Trump foe
description: The warm words came at a Maine rally as the vice president touted Republican House candidate Paul LePage and highlighted anti-fraud efforts.

title: Xi warns Trump that mishandling Taiwan could spark ‘conflicts’
description: China’s leader made clear his top priority is the fate of the contested island and its U.S. military support, a striking move given President Donald Trump’s effort to mend ties and deliver trade deals.

title: The Supreme Court keeps abortion pill mifepristone available by telehealth
description: The Supreme Court ruled on Thursday that the abortion pill mifepristone can continue to be prescribed online or over the phone and sent through the mail.

title: Trump and Xi make nice in China. What's it mean for the future?
description: NPR's Mary Louise Kelly speaks with China correspondent Jennifer Pak and White House correspondent Franco Ordonez about the relationship between President Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping.

title: Mapping where the redistricting fight stands and where it’s headed
description: As Trump pushes for a more Republican-friendly House map, more than half a dozen states are potential targets for mid-decade tweaks to congressional boundaries.

title: As Trump meets with Xi, security expert says China now faces the U.S. as a peer
description: Former national security official Rush Doshi says President Trump's sky-high tariffs on Chinese goods sparked a clash in which China prevailed. We look at the current state of U.S.-China relations.

title: Rubio is banned from China, but Beijing may have found a way around it
description: Chinese officials are using a different transliterated character for the secretary of state's name, perhaps to allow him to visit without lifting the 2020 ban.

title: Thrown-out ballots and map confusion: Voters are losing the redistricting battle
description: Much of the focus of the ongoing redistricting war has been on which political party will come out on top. But it's voters who will pay a cost, say voting experts and voting rights advocates.

title: Takeaways from Nebraska Democratic primaries filled with plot twists
description: Democrats knew they couldn’t unseat a GOP senator, so they backed an independent and fielded a candidate who promised to drop out if she won. Then it got complicated.

title: A look at Trump's goals for his summit in China
description: NPR's Steve Inskeep asks John Moolenaar, chairman of the House Select Committee on China, about President Trump's goals for his summit in Beijing.

title: Denise Powell wins Democratic primary for Nebraska's 2nd congressional district
description: Political organizer Denise Powell has defeated State Sen. John Cavanaugh to win the Democratic primary in the closely watched race for Nebraska's second congressional district.

title: The gerrymandering wars are here to stay
description: What happens next

title: White House to host 9-hour prayer festival focused on Christian roots of U.S.
description: Pete Hegseth, Marco Rubio and Mike Johnson will speak at the event, which centers on the idea that the founders wanted the U.S. to be explicitly Christian.

title: Facing headwinds at home, Trump signals eagerness to make deals at China summit
description: Under pressure from Beijing, the president has indicated an openness to rethinking U.S. support for Taiwan, alarming its backers.
